title: Long text is missing
excerpt: When I add html embed codes into the long text column it deletes when i move to a different page - is there anyway to fix this issue? thanks.

posts.author: heathercliff (heather)
posts.cookedHtml: When I add html embed codes into the long text column it deletes when i move to a different page - is there anyway to fix this issue? thanks.

posts.author: DanielSmith-IOI (Daniel Smith (IOI / BPX))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Heather,

According to the Long Text column documentation (available here: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360001150345-The-Long-Text-Column), HTML snippets are removed (at least in part) from Long Text columns for security reasons. So, unfortunately it currently does not look like there is a workaround for this.

All the best,
Daniel
